name: Mrs. Claus' Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Snip stems off the figs using scissors and cut them into small pieces.
2. Cream together shortening, sugar, eggs, and salt until well mixed.
3. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and mace into a bowl.
4. Combine all ingredients in another bowl.
5. Drop spoonfuls of dough onto buttered baking sheets.
6. Bake at moderate temperature (365°F) for about 12 minutes, or until golden brown.
Source: 48 Family Favorites with California Figs
Reprinted with the permission of The California Fig Advisory Board
Electronic format courtesy of Karen Mintzias
